query:
INSERT INTO appointments (
  id, project_id, organization_id, created_by_user_id,
  target_company_name, contact_person, meeting_datetime,
  status, notes, acquisition_date, acquirer_name, created_at, updated_at
) 
SELECT
  'test-pending-' || substr(hex(randomblob(8)), 1, 16),
  (SELECT id FROM projects LIMIT 1),
  (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE role = 'partner' LIMIT 1),
  (SELECT id FROM users WHERE role = 'partner' LIMIT 1),
  'テスト先方企業',
  'テスト担当者',
  datetime('now', '+1 day'),
  'pending',
  'テストメモ',
  date('now'),
  'テスト獲得者',
  datetime('now'),
  datetime('now');
